rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §38.011 governs school district employees' distribution of dietary supplements. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no overlapping operative text.
quote: Sec. 38.011. DIETARY SUPPLEMENTS. (a) A school district employee may not:
_note: No conflict; rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
